mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.category_id, p.seller_id, p.contact_info, p.status, p.reject_reason, p.is_deleted, p.created_at, p.updated_at, c.name AS category_name, u.username AS seller_username FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id JOIN users u ON u.id = p.seller_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.price, p.created_at, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT pi.image FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_image FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.is_deleted = FALSE AND p.status = 'active'
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.price, p.created_at, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT pi.image FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_image FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.is_deleted = FALSE AND p.status = 'pending' ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
